title: Context Selection, Compression, Deduplication, and Position · Behavior Case: Rag Context Dedup Conflicts
summary: A service stuffs every retrieved chunk into a long prompt, repeats overlapping text, truncates citations, and assumes a larger context window guarantees every passage is used. Predict the stakeholder decision, corpus and query identity, relevance assumption, failure cost, and evidence that would falsify the proposed RAG claim before opening the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the context dedup conflicts increment in citation-mapped context assembler. Learners progress through…
objectives: Collapse duplicate and overlapping chunks while retaining source diversity, conflicting versions, amendments, and dissent evidence.
Allocate tokens across instructions, query, history, evidence, citation metadata, answer, and safety reserves before assembly.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""rag-retrieval-augmented-generation cumulative evidence-grounded retrieval portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python models and fixed fixtures only.
Native ML packages, files, models, vector stores, provider APIs, networks, credentials,
OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production effects require authorized transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RagEvidence:
    corpus_version: str
    document_id: str
    chunk_id: str
    query_id: str
    source_span: str


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RetrievalBoundary:
    tenant_id: str
    authorized: bool
    answerable: bool
    context_budget: int


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python RAG engineering portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Evidence: rag-worked-rag-context-selection-5
# Competency: rag-worked-rag-context-selection-5.
# Case 9036: a multilingual support escalation.
# Operating constraint: record the failed stage, causal trace, repair, rollback, recovery, and residual-risk owner.
# Changed case: remove one supporting source and require abstention instead of a plausible unsupported answer.
def worked_rag_context_selection_5(candidate_tokens: int = 6400, context_budget: int = 2200, selected_tokens: int = 1800, duplicate_chunks: int = 1, citation_links: int = 6, order_tested: bool = True) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked5 = "worked5-5dekrow-9036"
    assert evidence_variant_worked5
    evidence_axes_worked5 = (
        "corpusworked5",
        "query5dekrow",
        "tenant9036",
        "indexworked59036",
        "prompt5dekrow9036",
        "evaluation9036worked5",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked5)) == 6
    if min(candidate_tokens, context_budget, selected_tokens) < 0:
        return False, selected_tokens, "token-accounting"
    if selected_tokens > context_budget or context_budget > candidate_tokens:
        return False, selected_tokens, "context-budget"
    if duplicate_chunks < 0 or citation_links < 1:
        return False, citation_links, "context-identity"
    if not order_tested:
        return False, citation_links, "position-bias"
    retained = selected_tokens - duplicate_chunks * 100
    assert retained >= 0
    return True, retained, "citation-mapped-context"

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Collapse duplicate and overlapping chunks while retaining source diversity, conflicting versions, amendments, and dissent evidence.
